title: Current Approaches to Social Problems Working Group
content:
Current Approaches to Social Problems Working Group

Research Focus

Examination of socio-economic and cultural problems within the scope of social sciences, realization of studies in related fields.

Focus of the research: The focus of the research is to examine, research and propose solutions to current social problems such as the living conditions of disadvantaged groups, problems in working life and urbanization.

The working group aims to conduct at least two studies on current issues in its first year and to share information at national and international congresses. Within the scope of the three-year goals, new members are included in the working group and multidisciplinary studies are carried out, and it is aimed to contribute to the process of conducting research and producing scientific knowledge by enabling students to take part in the working groups during the relevant period. During the five-year period, it is aimed to publish the studies carried out in the field by converting them into printed publications.
